name: Alternative Asset Literacy
description: Financial education platform covering alternative assets, DeFi, behavioral economics, ESG & climate finance, art investing, and gender lens investing. 13 tools: glossary lookup, full-text search, category browse, module discovery, user profile routing, platform overview, institutional research papers, geographic intelligence by topic, HNW submarket data by city, location-to-module routing, investor audience profiling, free-text audience matching, and advisor client gift bundle generation. Educational content only — not financial advice.

tools.name: glossary.lookup
tools.description: Look up a financial term from the 351-term glossary spanning alternative assets, DeFi, ESG, behavioral economics, art, and gender lens investing.

term.description: The financial term to look up (e.g. 'carried interest', 'impermanent loss', 'TCFD', 'green bonds')

tools.name: glossary.search
tools.description: Full-text search across all 351 financial terms and definitions — alternative assets, DeFi, behavioral economics, art, ESG, and gender lens investing.

query.description: Keyword or phrase to search across term names and definitions

tools.name: glossary.browse
tools.description: Browse all 351 glossary terms by category. Categories: Alternative Assets, Art, DeFi & Crypto, ESG & Climate, Behavioral Economics, Gender Lens Investing. Omit category to browse all terms.

category.description: Category to browse. Omit for all categories.

tools.name: modules.find
tools.description: Find the most relevant learning module for a given topic or investment concept.

topic.description: The topic or concept the user wants to learn about

tools.name: users.route
tools.description: Given a description of the user — their wealth level, investing experience, or specific interest — returns the most relevant discovery profile and recommended starting module.

userDescription.description: A description of the user's profile, background, or intent

tools.name: platform.overview
tools.description: Returns a structured overview of the Alternative Asset Literacy platform: modules, tools, pricing, and target audiences.

tools.name: research.papers
tools.description: Returns institutional research papers by category. 43 papers from IMF, BIS, World Bank, FSB, UN, Federal Reserve, EU, IFC, OECD, TCFD.

category.description: Category: CBDC, Stablecoin, ESG, Behavioral Economics, Gender Lens, Fintech, Cross-Border Payments. Omit for all.

tools.name: geo.by_module
tools.description: Returns geographic communities, institutions, conferences, and women's networks for a given investment topic.

tools.name: geo.by_location
tools.description: Given a city or region, returns which learning modules are most relevant there and why, with local institutional context.

location.description: City, neighborhood, or region (e.g. 'Zurich', 'London Mayfair', 'Singapore', 'Greenwich CT')

tools.name: geo.hnw_submarkets
tools.description: Returns neighborhood-level HNW intelligence for a city — postcodes, family offices, private banks, women's networks, art market anchors. Covers 30+ markets across US, UK, EU, Asia/Middle East.

tools.name: audience.profile
tools.description: Returns the full discovery profile for a specific investor audience — who they are, what they search for, recommended modules, toolkit priorities, and the relevant llms.txt discovery file URL.

audience_type.description: Audience type: hnw-women, art, behavioral, defi, esg, etf, advisor-client, advisor-b2b

tools.name: audience.match
tools.description: Given a free-text description of an investor, identifies the best-matching audience profile and returns their complete discovery data including recommended modules and toolkit priorities.

description.description: Free-text description of the investor — background, goals, wealth level, interests

tools.name: advisor.gift_bundle
tools.description: For financial advisors: given a client description, returns a curated education bundle — a 3-module learning path with rationale, 3 key terms the client should know, toolkit highlights, and a copy-paste suggested message the advisor can send to the client.

client_description.description: Description of the client — background, meeting context, knowledge gaps

topic.description: Optional topic focus override (e.g. 'DeFi', 'ESG', 'art investing', 'alternative assets')
